/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libsentry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libsentry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/sentry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/sentry_msgs/msg/vw__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sentry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/sentry_msgs/msg/scan_mode__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sentry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/sentry_msgs/msg/armor_presence__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
